channel.title: Cloud on Alexey Evlampiev
channel.description: Recent content in Cloud on Alexey Evlampiev

item.title: Decoupling Compute and Storage in Postgres: The Architectural Implications of Databricks Lakebase
item.description: A vendor-neutral analysis of how Databricks Lakebase and the broader serverless PostgreSQL convergence fundamentally change what we can assume about database deployments.
